name: headless-e2e-via-game-handle
description: Pointer lock cannot engage in the headless preview browser, so gameplay E2E goes through window.__game: set __game.input.locked = true (plain field) to satisfy lock guards, dispatch KeyboardEvent/MouseEvent to exercise real handlers, hide #overlay via style.display for screenshots, and assert on __game state (inventory slots, drops.count, scene object visibility by name)
